sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Thanem te'n hat zo ci hen
A zawng te'n hau zo ci hen
Mittaw te'n mu zo ci hen
Topa'n kei tung hong sem khin zo

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Hosana Hosana a kigo Van Tuuno
Hosana Hosana sihna pan thokik zo hi

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Tua guntui sung kaki bual hi
Mawhna teng hong sawp siang hi
Hong hon Pa itna cik tui
Vantung pan hong luang suk hi

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Tua guntui thuk sung pantho in
Hong suak ta sak ahih man
